uw-seattle-human-centered-design-enginee.title: Human Centered Design & Engineering
uw-seattle-human-centered-design-enginee.recommendedTrackSummary: AST-2 is the current closest Green River transfer path for this degree because it matches 3 of the 7 degree-specific Green River classes currently tracked for this major.
whyThisTrack: AST-2 has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including PHYS& 114, MATH& 142, ENGL& 101.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that AST-2 does not cover by itself.

beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Engineering Elective Credit (15 credits)
beforeEnrollmentChecklist.note: Program-specific approved bucket; do not satisfy with generic Area of Inquiry category matching unless an approved filter also backs the course.

requirementGroup.label: Engineering Elective Credit (15 credits)
requirementGroup.sourceHeading: Students must take 23 credits of HCDE electives, with at least 15 credits from the Engineering Electives list and at least 8 credits from the Systems and Society Electives list. Additional courses from the Engineering Electives list may also apply towards the Systems and Society Electives requirement if the Engineering Electives requirement has been satisfied.
